summary: Tested HSBC Germany MX Transaction Platform - Backend APIs fully functional, frontend authentication session persistence issue identified

integration_issues.issue: User gets redirected to login page after successful login when navigating between pages or performing actions

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings about width/height dimensions being -1
Hydration errors with span elements inside tbody elements

passed_tests: Login API with invalid credentials (401 Unauthorized)
Dashboard chart data API (returns status and volume data)
Create new transaction API (creates and returns transaction)
Seed sample data API (populates test transactions)
Login form UI (accepts credentials and submits)
Dashboard UI loads with transaction data and charts
New Transaction page structure (two-step wizard visible)
New Transaction Step 1 form elements (PACS dropdown, bank fields)
Pre-filled sender bank data (HSBC Germany details)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - UI loads correctly but authentication persistence fails

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue. Users are being redirected to login page after successful authentication when navigating between pages or performing actions. This prevents testing of the complete New Transaction workflow. The backend APIs are working perfectly.
